old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-kd14","title":"RREQ/RREP hop_limit and hop_count not validated before serialization","description":"File: python/src/lichen/loadng/messages.py
Lines: 64, 100

The `hop_limit` and `hop_count` fields are serialized with `& 0xFF` masking but no validation that they are in valid range (0-255 or more strictly 0-15 per MAX_HOP_LIMIT).

Problem: If hop_limit is -1, `(-1) & 0xFF = 255` which silently produces an invalid wire format. If hop_limit is 300, it becomes 44 silently.

Unlike seq_num (which raises LoadngError if out of range), these fields are silently truncated.

Fix: Add validation before serialization:
```python
if not 0 <= self.hop_limit <= MAX_HOP_LIMIT:
    raise LoadngError(f'hop_limit out of range: {self.hop_limit}')
```","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:40.074327Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:40.074369Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-kd14","title":"RREQ/RREP hop_limit and hop_count not validated before serialization","description":"File: python/src/lichen/loadng/messages.py
Lines: 64, 100

The `hop_limit` and `hop_count` fields are serialized with `& 0xFF` masking but no validation that they are in valid range (0-255 or more strictly 0-15 per MAX_HOP_LIMIT).

Problem: If hop_limit is -1, `(-1) & 0xFF = 255` which silently produces an invalid wire format. If hop_limit is 300, it becomes 44 silently.

Unlike seq_num (which raises LoadngError if out of range), these fields are silently truncated.

Fix: Add validation before serialization:
```python
if not 0 <= self.hop_limit <= MAX_HOP_LIMIT:
    raise LoadngError(f'hop_limit out of range: {self.hop_limit}')
```","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:21:40.074327Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:21:56.283126685Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:21:56.283126685Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:26:56.283126685Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:21:56.283126685Z"}

new_value: Added range validation for hop_limit/hop_count in RREQ/RREP.to_bytes (0 to MAX_HOP_LIMIT). Prevents silent truncation of invalid values. Matches seq_num pattern. Verified in messages.py and tests. Commit ffcd355ab.
